Get Started

Gravity Forms Template Library

Employment Application Form Template

Find the right people for the job with this professional employment application form template.


Employment Application Form

Step 1 of 3

0%
This field is for validation purposes and should be left unchanged.

Your Personal Information

Your Name
Your Email Address
Address
When is the best time for us to reach you via telephone?

Position You're Applying For

Position You're Applying For
Hours You Are Available for Work
Please tell us what hours you are available for work each day of the week.
Monday
Tuesday
Wednesday
Thursday
Friday
 

Previous Employment

Your Previous Employers
Please list your previous employers, the dates you worked and the position you held
Employer
Dates
Position
Phone
 

More About You

Upload your resume in .pdf, .doc or .docx format
Accepted file types: pdf, doc, docx, Max. file size: 25 MB.
Terms and Conditions(Required)
Terms and conditions placeholder.

Template Features

All you need to know!

Use this fully cutomizable employment application form template to collect the information you need from applicants.

Get this form today

Fully customizable

The employment application form template is fully customizable using our intuitive drag-and-drop form editor.

Extensive integrations

Easily integrate this form template with all Gravity Forms Add-Ons including email marketing services and CRM platforms.

Conditional logic

Use conditional logic to tailor your application form questions, helping you get the detailed information you need.

File uploads

The File Upload feature enables applicants to upload CVs, resumes, covering letters, or other important documentation.

Embed, publish, and go!

Embed and publish this template with ease on any page or post on your WordPress website.

Gravity Forms license

This template can be installed with any active Basic, Pro, or Elite Gravity Forms license.

Resources

Do more with this template.

  • Tech stacks we love for marketing

    Gravity Forms is the foundation of a modern marketing tech stack. Turn form submissions into workflows that keep leads and teams moving.

    Read more: Tech stacks we love for marketing

  • Starter Guide: How to Create an Employee Engagement Survey

    With Gravity Forms, it’s easy to create an employee engagement survey for your WordPress site. Start gathering feedback today!

    Read more: Starter Guide: How to Create an Employee Engagement Survey

  • Gravity Forms CRM Add-Ons: All you need to know!

    Online forms and CRMs go hand in hand. Find out about the numerous CRM integrations that Gravity Forms offers, helping your business to succeed.

    Read more: Gravity Forms CRM Add-Ons: All you need to know!

  • Starter Guide: How to Create a Job Application Form in WordPress

    Job applications are similar to many other contact forms. In this article, we walk you through the process of creating your own job application form.

    Read more: Starter Guide: How to Create a Job Application Form in WordPress

System Requirements

Gravity Forms recommends the same system requirements as WordPress: PHP v7.4+, MySQL v5.7+ and the latest version of WordPress.
